languages.text: Attacking an enemy with this weapon applies stacks of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Static Charge{/g} buff on them equal to damage dealt.

traits.locale_text: Attacking an enemy with this weapon applies stacks of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Static Charge{/g} buff on them equal to damage dealt.

languages.text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Targets hit with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by that attack. When the wielder kills a creature with those stacks by this maul, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer shock damage equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

languages.text: Bu çekicin {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurduğu{/g} düşmanlar, saldırının verdiği hasar kadar {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu birikimlere sahip bir yaratık öldüğünde onun bitişiğindeki tüm yaratıklar (kullanan kişi hariç), <u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimi sayısı</u> kadar {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} alır.
languages.original_text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Bu çekicin vurduğu düşmanlar, saldırının verdiği hasar kadar {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu birikimlere sahip bir yaratık öldüğünde onun bitişiğindeki tüm yaratıklar (kullanan kişi hariç), <u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimi sayısı</u> kadar şok hasarı alır.

Bu çekicin vurduğu düşmanlar, saldırının verdiği hasar kadar {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu birikimlere sahip bir yaratık öldüğünde onun bitişiğindeki tüm yaratıklar (kullanan kişi hariç), <u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}statik yük{/g} birikimi sayısı</u> kadar şok hasarı alır.

languages.text: Los objetivos {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}golpeados{/g} por esta maza sufren tantas acumulaciones de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}carga estática{/g} como el daño infligido por el ataque. Cuando una criatura muere teniendo estas acumulaciones, todas las criaturas adyacentes a ella (excepto el portador) sufren tanto {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} como el <u>número de acumulaciones de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}carga estática{/g}</u>.
languages.original_text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Los objetivos golpeados por esta maza sufren tantas acumulaciones de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}carga estática{/g} como el daño infligido por el ataque. Cuando una criatura muere teniendo estas acumulaciones, todas las criaturas adyacentes a ella (excepto el portador) sufren tanto daño de conmoción como el <u>número de acumulaciones de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}carga estática{/g}</u>.

languages.text: 使用这把大锤{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}敌人时，会对其施加{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静电{/g}层数，等同于攻击造成的伤害。当拥有“静电”效果的生物死亡时，其附近的所有生物（除装备者外）都会受到{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}，等同于<u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静电{/g}效果层数</u>。
languages.original_text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: 使用这把大锤命中敌人时，会对其施加{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静电{/g}层数，等同于攻击造成的伤害。当拥有“静电”效果的生物死亡时，其附近的所有生物（除装备者外）都会受到电击伤害，等同于<u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静电{/g}效果层数</u>。

languages.text: Les cibles {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchées{/g} par cette masse reçoivent un nombre de cumuls de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Charge statique{/g} égal aux dégâts infligés par l'attaque. Quand une créature affectée par ces cumuls est tuée, toutes les créatures adjacentes (sauf l'utilisateur) subissent des {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} égaux au <u>nombre de cumuls de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Charge statique{/g}</u>.
languages.original_text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Les cibles touchées par cette masse reçoivent un nombre de cumuls de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Charge statique{/g} égal aux dégâts infligés par l'attaque. Quand une créature affectée par ces cumuls est tuée, toutes les créatures adjacentes (sauf l'utilisateur) subissent des dégâts d'électrocution égaux au <u>nombre de cumuls de {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Charge statique{/g}</u>.

languages.text: このモールで攻撃されたターゲットは、その攻撃によって与えたダメージと同じ数の{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックを受ける。そのスタックを持つ生物が倒されると、隣接するすべての生物（使用者を除く）が<u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックの数</u>と同じショックダメージを受ける。
languages.original_text: Targets hit with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer shock damage equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: このモールで攻撃されたターゲットは、その攻撃によって与えたダメージと同じ数の{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックを受ける。そのスタックを持つ生物が倒されると、隣接するすべての生物（使用者を除く）が<u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックの数</u>と同じショックダメージを受ける。

このモールで攻撃されたターゲットは、その攻撃によって与えたダメージと同じ数の{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックを受ける。そのスタックを持つ生物が倒されると、隣接するすべての生物（使用者を除く）が<u>{g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}静電気{/g}スタックの数</u>と同じショックダメージを受ける。

languages.text: Mit diesem Hammer {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}getroffene{/g} Ziele werden mit {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Statikladung{/g}-Stapeln belegt, die dem verursachten Schaden entsprechen. Wird eine Kreatur mit diesen Stapeln getötet, erleiden alle Kreaturen auf angrenzenden Felder (mit Ausnahme des Trägers) {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}, der der <u>Zahl der {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Statikladung{/g}-Stapel</u> entspricht.
languages.original_text: Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Mit diesem Hammer getroffene Ziele werden mit {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Statikladung{/g}-Stapeln belegt, die dem verursachten Schaden entsprechen. Wird eine Kreatur mit diesen Stapeln getötet, erleiden alle Kreaturen auf angrenzenden Felder (mit Ausnahme des Trägers) Schockschaden, der der <u>Zahl der {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}Statikladung{/g}-Stapel</u> entspricht.

languages.text: Цели, получившие попадание этой булавой, получают число уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}, равное полученному урону. Когда такое существо погибает, все существа на соседних клетках (кроме обладателя булавы) получают электрический урон, равный <u>числу уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}</u>.
languages.original_text: Targets hit with this maul suffer a number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks equal to damage dealt by the attack. When a creature with those stacks is killed, all creatures adjacent to it (except the wielder) suffer shock damage equal to <u>number of {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}static charge{/g} stacks</u>.

traits.locale_text: Цели, получившие попадание этой булавой, получают число уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}, равное полученному урону. Когда такое существо погибает, все существа на соседних клетках (кроме обладателя булавы) получают электрический урон, равный <u>числу уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}</u>.

Цели, получившие попадание этой булавой, получают число уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}, равное полученному урону. Когда такое существо погибает, все существа на соседних клетках (кроме обладателя булавы) получают электрический урон, равный <u>числу уровней {g|f:45bce77d4a7d458781177cf9353cd462}электростатического заряда{/g}</u>.
